---
title: "Annotate_DMRs"
output: html_document
date: '2025-01-30'
---

```{r}
library(GenomicRanges)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
```

## Read DMR files
```{r}
DMRS_clone1 <- read.csv('C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/DMRS_DM1_c1.csv', row.names = 1)
DMRS_clone3 <- read.csv('C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/DMRS_DM1_c3.csv', row.names=1)
DMRS <- read.csv('C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/DMRS_DM1_c2.csv', row.names = 1)

```


## Get CpG positions in GRanges object
```{r}

map_DMRS2genes <- function(dmrs) {
  # GRanges object
  dmr_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = dmrs$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = dmrs$start, end = dmrs$end),
  areaStat = dmrs$areaStat,
  nCG = dmrs$nCG
  )
  
  # Gene annotations
  txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
  genes_gr <- genes(txdb)
  
  # Find nearest genes
  nearest_genes_idx <- nearest(dmr_gr, genes_gr)
  nearest_genes <- genes_gr[nearest_genes_idx]

  # Combien into dataframe
  dmr_with_genes <- cbind(
  as.data.frame(dmr_gr),
  gene_id = nearest_genes$gene_id,
  gene_chr = as.character(seqnames(nearest_genes)),
  gene_start = start(nearest_genes),
  gene_end = end(nearest_genes),
  gene_strand = as.character(strand(nearest_genes))
  )
  return(dmr_with_genes)

}

DMRS_nearest_genes <- map_DMRS2genes(DMRS)
DMRS_c1_nearest_genes <- map_DMRS2genes(DMRS_clone1)
DMRS_c3_nearest_genes <- map_DMRS2genes(DMRS_clone3)
```

# Map to gene symbols
```{r}
entrez2symbols <- function(entrez_list) {
  gene_symbols <- mapIds(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys = as.character(entrez_list),
    column = "SYMBOL",
    keytype = "ENTREZID",
    multiVals = "first"
  )
  return(gene_symbols)
} 

DMRS_nearest_genes$GeneSymbol <- entrez2symbols(DMRS_nearest_genes$gene_id)
DMRS_c1_nearest_genes$GeneSymbol <- entrez2symbols(DMRS_c1_nearest_genes$gene_id)
DMRS_c3_nearest_genes$GeneSymbol <- entrez2symbols(DMRS_c3_nearest_genes$gene_id)
```
